name: Delete eco news from favorites by id -- @1.5
fullName: Delete Eco News from Favorites: Delete eco news from favorites by id

steps.name: Given I am an authorized user
When I send request to delete eco news with id "90" from favorites
Deletion from favourites eco new by id
Then the response status code should be 400
And the response message get/delete request should be "This eco new is not in favorites."

parameters.name: message
parameters.value: This eco new is not in favorites.

parameterValues: This eco new is not in favorites.
